# Write-Host -ForegroundColor Blue "Material Theme"
# git clone https://github.com/Codextor/npp-material-theme.git

Write-Host -ForegroundColor Green step3: Dracula will be available in Settings > Style Configurator

scripts.name: cmd
Powershell [old]
scripts.inline_script:
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "    DIAGNOSTIC: WINDOWS POWERSHELL" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "PROCESS: $((Get-Process -Id $PID).ProcessName)"
Write-Host "EDITION: $($PSVersionTable.PSEdition) (Desktop = Old)"
Write-Host "VERSION: $($PSVersionTable.PSVersion)"
Write-Host "PATH:    $PSHOME"
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host ""
pause

scripts.name: PWSH Core
scripts.inline_script:
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "    DIAGNOSTIC: POWERSHELL CORE (PWSH)" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "PROCESS: $((Get-Process -Id $PID).ProcessName)"
Write-Host "EDITION: $($PSVersionTable.PSEdition) (Core = New)"
Write-Host "COMMIT:  $($PSVersionTable.GitCommitId)"
Write-Host "HOME:    $HOME"
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ""
pause

scripts.name: cmd admin or not
powershell admin or not
scripts.inline_script:
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "    DIAGNOSTIC: WINDOWS POWERSHELL" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "VERSION: $($PSVersionTable.PSVersion)"

# Check for Admin rights
$currentPrincipal = New-Object Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal([Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent())
if ($currentPrincipal.IsInRole([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator)) {
    Write-Host "MODE:    *** ADMINISTRATOR ***" -ForegroundColor Yellow
} else {
    Write-Host "MODE:    NORMAL USER"
}

Write-Host "CWD:     $pwd"
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
pause

} else {

Write-Host "CWD:     $pwd"

pause

scripts.name: Android Collab
scripts.inline_script:
%%shell
# 1. Setup Environment
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64
export ANDROID_HOME=/content/android-sdk
apt-get install -y openjdk-17-jdk-headless > /dev/null

# 2. Clean and Create Directories
rm -rf $ANDROID_HOME
mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools

# 3. Download REAL Command Line Tools (Official Google Link)
# IMPORTANT: Verify this URL for the latest version if issues persist.
# You can usually find the latest URL on: https://developer.android.com/tools/releases/platform-tools
ANDROID_CMDLINE_TOOLS_URL="https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-11076708_latest.zip"
wget -q $ANDROID_CMDLINE_TOOLS_URL -O cmdline-tools.zip

# Create a temporary directory for unzipping
mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools-temp
unzip -q cmdline-tools.zip -d $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools-temp
rm cmdline-tools.zip

# Create the 'latest' directory within $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools
mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest

# Move the *contents* of the unzipped 'cmdline-tools' folder
# to '$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest'.
# The unzip command typically creates a 'cmdline-tools' directory at the target location.
mv $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools-temp/cmdline-tools/* $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/

# Clean up the temporary directory
rm -rf $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools-temp

# 4. Set PATH
# The sdkmanager executable is now in $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin
export PATH=$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH

# 5. Accept Licenses & Install the SPECIFIC versions your project wants (35 and 36)
# This prevents the "License not accepted" error
yes | sdkmanager --licenses > /dev/null

# Install required platforms and build tools
sdkmanager "platforms;android-35" "platforms;android-36" "build-tools;35.0.0" "platform-tools" --verbose

# 6. Run Build with Vertical Output
cd /content/drive/MyDrive/FolderSync
chmod +x gradlew
./gradlew assembleDebug --console=plain

scripts.name:
Android Collab
Complete
scripts.inline_script:
%%shell
# --- 1. CONFIGURATION ---
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64
export ANDROID_HOME=/content/android-sdk
PROJECT_PATH="/content/drive/MyDrive/XXX"

# --- 2. INSTALL JAVA & CLEANUP ---
echo "☕ Installing Java..."
apt-get install -y openjdk-17-jdk-headless > /dev/null
rm -rf $ANDROID_HOME
mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools

# --- 3. DOWNLOAD & SETUP SDK ---
echo "📦 Downloading Android SDK Tools..."
URL="https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-11076708_latest.zip"
wget -q $URL -O cmdline-tools.zip
unzip -q cmdline-tools.zip -d /tmp/sdk-temp
mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest
mv /tmp/sdk-temp/cmdline-tools/* $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/
rm -rf cmdline-tools.zip /tmp/sdk-temp

# --- 4. SET PATHS ---
export PATH=$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH

# --- 5. LICENSES & PLATFORMS ---
echo "📝 Accepting Licenses & Installing Platforms 35/36..."
yes | sdkmanager --licenses > /dev/null
sdkmanager "platforms;android-35" "platforms;android-36" "build-tools;35.0.0" "platform-tools" > /dev/null

# --- 6. RUN THE BUILD ---
echo "🚀 Starting Build..."
cd "$PROJECT_PATH"
chmod +x gradlew
./gradlew assembleDebug --console=plain

scripts.name:
Android Collab
First Check
scripts.inline_script:
%%shell

# --- 1. CONFIGURATION ---
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64
export ANDROID_HOME=/content/android-sdk
export PATH=$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH
PROJECT_PATH="/content/drive/MyDrive/XXX"

# --- 2. CHECK/INSTALL JAVA ---
if ! command -v java &> /dev/null; then
    echo "☕ Installing Java 17..."
    apt-get update -qq
    apt-get install -y openjdk-17-jdk-headless > /dev/null
else
    echo "✅ Java is already installed."
fi

# --- 3. CHECK/DOWNLOAD SDK ---
if [ ! -d "$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest" ]; then
    echo "📦 SDK not found. Downloading Android SDK Tools..."
    mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools
    URL="https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-11076708_latest.zip"
    wget -q $URL -O cmdline-tools.zip
    unzip -q cmdline-tools.zip -d /tmp/sdk-temp
    mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest
    mv /tmp/sdk-temp/cmdline-tools/* $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/
    rm -rf cmdline-tools.zip /tmp/sdk-temp
else
    echo "✅ Android SDK tools already exist."
fi

# --- 4. LICENSES & PLATFORMS ---
# Note: sdkmanager is smart enough to skip if platforms are already there, 
# but we can wrap it to be even faster.
if [ ! -d "$ANDROID_HOME/platforms/android-35" ]; then
    echo "📝 Installing Platforms & Accepting Licenses..."
    yes | sdkmanager --licenses > /dev/null
    sdkmanager "platforms;android-35" "platforms;android-36" "build-tools;35.0.0" "platform-tools" > /dev/null
else
    echo "✅ Platforms already installed."
fi

# --- 5. RUN THE BUILD ---
if [ -d "$PROJECT_PATH" ]; then
    echo "🚀 Starting Build..."
    cd "$PROJECT_PATH"
    chmod +x gradlew
    ./gradlew assembleDebug --console=plain
else
    echo "❌ Error: Project path $PROJECT_PATH not found. Did you mount Google Drive?"
fi

scripts.name:
Android Collab
Fix JAR
scripts.inline_script:
%%shell

# --- 1. CONFIGURATION ---
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64
export ANDROID_HOME=/content/android-sdk
export PATH=$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH
PROJECT_PATH="/content/drive/MyDrive/ConvexShare"

# --- 2. CHECK/INSTALL JAVA ---
if ! command -v java &> /dev/null; then
    echo "☕ Installing Java 17..."
    apt-get update -qq
    apt-get install -y openjdk-17-jdk-headless > /dev/null
else
    echo "✅ Java is already installed."
fi

# --- 3. CHECK/DOWNLOAD SDK ---
if [ ! -d "$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest" ]; then
    echo "📦 SDK not found. Downloading Android SDK Tools..."
    mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools
    URL="https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-11076708_latest.zip"
    wget -q $URL -O cmdline-tools.zip
    unzip -q cmdline-tools.zip -d /tmp/sdk-temp
    mkdir -p $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest
    mv /tmp/sdk-temp/cmdline-tools/* $ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/
    rm -rf cmdline-tools.zip /tmp/sdk-temp
else
    echo "✅ Android SDK tools already exist."
fi

# --- 4. LICENSES & PLATFORMS ---
if [ ! -d "$ANDROID_HOME/platforms/android-35" ]; then
    echo "📝 Installing Platforms & Accepting Licenses..."
    yes | sdkmanager --licenses > /dev/null
    sdkmanager "platforms;android-35" "platforms;android-36" "build-tools;35.0.0" "platform-tools" > /dev/null
else
    echo "✅ Platforms already installed."
fi

# --- 5. FIX GRADLE WRAPPER JAR ---
if [ -d "$PROJECT_PATH" ]; then
    cd "$PROJECT_PATH"
    if [ ! -f "gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar" ] || [ ! -s "gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar" ]; then
        echo "🔧 Downloading gradle-wrapper.jar..."
        mkdir -p gradle/wrapper
        wget -q https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gradle/gradle/master/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar -O gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar
    fi
fi

# --- 6. RUN THE BUILD ---
if [ -d "$PROJECT_PATH" ]; then
    echo "🚀 Starting Build..."
    cd "$PROJECT_PATH"
    chmod +x gradlew
    ./gradlew assembleDebug --console=plain
else
    echo "❌ Error: Project path $PROJECT_PATH not found. Did you mount Google Drive?"
fi
